context: West HVAC Services — employee and owner reimbursement policy for business-related expenses incurred in the field or for operations.
policy_name: West HVAC Services Reimbursement Policy v1.2

validation_rules.action: Reimburse at IRS standard mileage rate (current year)
validation_rules.notes: Driver must log start/end location and business purpose. Commute miles are not reimbursable.
validation_rules.requirement: Mileage log submitted with date, origin, destination, and miles driven

validation_rules.notes: Parts must be listed on the job work order. Personal tool purchases are not covered.
validation_rules.requirement: Original receipt or supplier invoice required for all parts and materials purchases over $25

validation_rules.action: Reimburse up to $40 per day with receipt
validation_rules.notes: Applies only when job site is more than 50 miles from home base and requires overnight stay or full-day travel
validation_rules.requirement: Receipt required; must note job number on submission

validation_rules.action: Reimburse in full; preferred vendor list should be used when possible
validation_rules.notes: Contact Greg West before purchasing tools over $200 for approval
validation_rules.requirement: Tools and equipment costing more than $50 require advance approval and receipt

validation_rules.notes: Only work-related continuing education, certification renewals, and licensing fees are covered
validation_rules.requirement: Pre-approval required; receipt or certificate of completion required for reimbursement

validation_rules.action: Submit via QuickBooks expense report by the 5th of the following month
validation_rules.notes: Late submissions may be held until the next pay cycle
validation_rules.requirement: All expense reports must include receipts and be submitted within 30 days of expense
